item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: President Donald Trump said Sunday that the U.S. will guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz, as he has offered little optimism that he will accept a recent proposal from Tehran to end the war

media:content.media:text: Dozens of boats float in blue waters in front of a steep mountain range in the distance.
media:content.media:description: Vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, Musandam, Oman, April 27, 2026.

item.title: Trump says U.S. will begin guiding ships through Strait of Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: Rudy Giuliani has been hospitalized and is in critical condition, according to his spokesperson, Ted Goodman.“Mayor Rudy Giuliani is currently in the hospital, where he remains in critical but stable condition.

media:content.media:text: Rudy Giuliani stands at a lectern with two microphones, wearing a white suit and yellow tie.
media:content.media:description: The spokesman did not specify why the former New York City mayor, who is 81, had been hospitalized, or which hospital admitted him.

item.title: Rudy Giuliani in 'critical' condition in hospital, spokesman says

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
Kayla Hayempour
Amina Kilpatrick
item.description: President Donald Trump said the U.S. will guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz, as he has offered little optimism that he will accept a recent proposal from Tehran to end the war

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: Donald Trump in the Oval Office at the White House on Sept. 19, 2025.

media:content.media:text: The REDMOD AI model analyzes a CT scan to detect early tissue changes associated with pancreatic cancer.
media:content.media:description: The REDMOD AI model analyzes a CT scan to detect early tissue changes associated with pancreatic cancer.

item.title: Here's the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
Andrew Jones
Isabella Colletta
item.description: Three passengers have died, and three other people are being treated amid a "public health event" involving suspected hantavirus infections on a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean, health officials said

media:content.media:text: A cruiser ship in arctic waters with a large iceberg shrouded in clouds behind it
media:content.media:description: The Hondius cruiser at Portal Point in the Antarctic Peninsula, Feb. 5, 2023.

item.title: 3 dead, 3 ill in suspected hantavirus infections on cruise ship

item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche tells Meet the Press the indictment of former FBI Director James Comey goes beyond an Instagram post showing seashells arranged to say “86 47,” terminology the Justice Department says threatens the president’s life.

media:content.media:title: Acting AG Todd Blanche says Comey indictment looks beyond ‘a single Instagram post’
media:content.media:description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche tells Meet the Press the indictment of former FBI Director James Comey goes beyond an Instagram post showing seashells arranged to say “86 47,” terminology the Justice Department says threatens the president’s life.

item.title: Acting AG Todd Blanche says Comey indictment looks beyond ‘a single Instagram post’

item.description: Spirit Airlines announced in a statement that it would wind down operations immediately, canceling all flights, over rising jet fuel costs and struggling with profitability. NBC News’ Jay Blackman reports on how the decision will impact thousands of employees and travelers.

media:content.media:title: Spirit Airlines announces all flights are canceled as it shuts down operations
media:content.media:description: Spirit Airlines announced in a statement that it would wind down operations immediately, canceling all flights, over rising jet fuel costs and struggling with profitability. NBC News’ Jay Blackman reports on how the decision will impact thousands of employees and travelers.

item.title: Spirit Airlines announces all flights are canceled as it shuts down operations

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
Megan Shannon
item.description: The Trump administration has made an aggressive push to add the president's name to buildings, battleships, money and government websites.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: DONALD J. TRUMP etched into a wet stone facade, with snow covering the grass beneath it.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Workers in two hydraulic cranes are suspended above the ground in front of the Kennedy Center's facade, with a giant purple tarp stretched behind them.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump stands next to a signboard with an image of a battleship inside a room at Mar-a-Lago.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Designs for semiquincentennial gold coins featuring Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: A 50 dollar bill poking up from a seat pocket in President Trump's pants as he ascends the stairs to Air Force One.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: The State Department will be releasing a limited series of U.S. passports featuring the image of President Trump, a State Department official said
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Image: Workers install a new banner featuring an image of President Donald Trump on the facade of the U.S. Department of Justice
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump speaks at at a "Trump Accounts" event on Jan. 28, 2026.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Announces TrumpRx From The White House
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

item.title: 12 places Trump's name or image is being added by the federal government

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
item.description: Kimi Antonelli won the Formula 1 Miami Grand Prix on Sunday, securing his third victory in a row and increasing his lead in the world championship.

media:content.media:text: Andrea Kimi Antonelli of Italy driving the Mercedes AMG Petronas F1 Team W17 on track during the F1 Grand Prix of Miami at Miami International Autodrome on May 3, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli holds the trophy as he celebrates on the podium after the 2026 Miami Formula 1 Grand Prix on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Wide view of cars on a racetrack
media:content.media:description: Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli holds the trophy as he celebrates on the podium after the 2026 Miami Formula 1 Grand Prix on Sunday.

item.title: Kimi Antonelli wins Formula 1 Miami Grand Prix, extending his lead in the standings

item.description: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access

media:content.media:title: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access
media:content.media:description: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access

item.title: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access

item.description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California says that while multiple presidents have not gone to Congress for war authorization in the past, President Trump’s actions are a “clear violation” of the War Powers Act of 1973.

media:content.media:title: Senator says Trump's actions violates war powers law
media:content.media:description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California says that while multiple presidents have not gone to Congress for war authorization in the past, President Trump’s actions are a “clear violation” of the War Powers Act of 1973.

item.title: Senator says Trump's actions violates war powers law

item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche reacts to President Trump saying he doesn't use the word "war" when referring to the U.S. conflict with Iran.

media:content.media:title: DOJ chief says U.S. not actively at war with Iran
media:content.media:description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche reacts to President Trump saying he doesn't use the word "war" when referring to the U.S. conflict with Iran.

item.title: DOJ chief says U.S. not actively at war with Iran

item.description: Surveillance video shows a driver crashing through the front doors of the Portland Athletic Club before the vehicle erupted into flames.

media:content.media:title: Driver crashes through Portland club
media:content.media:description: Surveillance video shows a driver crashing through the front doors of the Portland Athletic Club before the vehicle erupted into flames.

item.title: Driver crashes through Portland club

item.description: A mom’s viral plea brought thousands together to a city in Idaho to make one little boy’s birthday unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: Thousands make little boy's birthday unforgettable

item.description: As album rollouts continue to evolve, fans recently attempted to melt a giant ice block in the middle of Toronto as part of Drake's "Iceman" announcement. But how did we get here? NBC News' Gadi Schwartz takes a look back at other memorable rollouts, and how they have advanced through the years.

media:content.media:title: The evolution of album rollouts
media:content.media:description: As album rollouts continue to evolve, fans recently attempted to melt a giant ice block in the middle of Toronto as part of Drake's "Iceman" announcement. But how did we get here? NBC News' Gadi Schwartz takes a look back at other memorable rollouts, and how they have advanced through the years.

item.title: The evolution of album rollouts

Isabella Colletta

media:content.media:description: The Hondius cruiser at Portal Point in the Antarctic Peninsula, Feb. 5, 2023.

item.description: Rudy Giuliani has been hospitalized and is in critical condition, according to his spokesperson, Ted Goodman.“Mayor Rudy Giuliani is currently in the hospital, where he remains in critical but stable condition.

media:content.media:text: Rudy Giuliani stands at a lectern with two microphones, wearing a white suit and yellow tie.
media:content.media:description: The spokesman did not specify why the former New York City mayor, who is 81, had been hospitalized, or which hospital admitted him.

item.title: Rudy Giuliani in 'critical' condition in hospital, spokesman says

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: What some viewers thought was an AI-generated meme in “The Devil Wears Prada 2” was actually drawn by a human artist

media:content.media:text: Meryl Streep clasps her hands while seated at a table wearing a suitcoat and black eyeglasses.
media:content.media:description: Meryl Streep in a scene from The Devil Wears Prada 2, released in 2026.

item.title: A 'Devil Wears Prada 2' meme that viewers thought was AI slop was actually made by a human
